sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108383" key="u(po/zeucis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόζευξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n108383.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a subjoining,</tr_> figure of speech illustrated by Verg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Aen.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.149</biblScope> </bibl> sq., Charis.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.280</biblScope> </bibl> K., Diom.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.444</biblScope> </bibl> K., Donat.ad Ter. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Phorm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">162</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
